items.name: Security Keycard
items.description: A blue keycard with clearance level 3. Grants access to restricted areas.

items.name: Data Chip
items.description: A small crystalline data storage device. Contains encrypted ship logs.

items.name: Hydro Spanner
items.description: A multipurpose engineering tool. Essential for warp core repairs.

items.name: Power Cell
items.description: A portable energy source. Glows faintly with contained plasma.

items.name: Ration Pack
items.description: Standard issue space rations. Tastes like regret and cardboard.

items.name: Water Filter
items.description: A portable water purification device. Still in its original packaging.

items.name: Survival Kit
items.description: A combined ration and water supply. Enough for 72 hours.

items.name: Encrypted Log
items.description: A decoded ship log revealing the crew's last known coordinates.

items.name: Multi-Tool
items.description: A compact Swiss-army-knife equivalent. Has a laser pointer.

items.name: ID Badge
items.description: Belonged to Engineer Chen. Clearance level 2.

items.name: Star Map Fragment
items.description: A torn piece of a star chart. Shows an uncharted system.

items.name: Telescope Lens Cap
items.description: The missing lens cap for the observation deck telescope.

items.name: Crew Manifest
items.description: Lists all personnel aboard. Several names are crossed out.

items.name: Warp Coil
items.description: A replacement coil for the warp core. Heavy and warm to the touch.

items.name: Comms Beacon
items.description: A distress signal emitter. Range: 4 light years.
